benefits.description: BPC dulled effects of Adderall, eventually enabling cessation after 15 years of abuse

protocol_notes: Started pinning BPC a few months ago after reading about its potential to repair brain damage from amphetamines. Notes BPC dulled effects of Adderall requiring more to feel anything, ultimately leading to quitting after 15 years of on-and-off abuse. Describes it as a struggle but worth it.
